review_metadata.review_pass: integer — which review cycle this is (1 = first pass, 2 = after first regeneration, etc.)

clips.attempt: integer — generation attempt number, starting from 1
clips.file_path: string — path to the clip file
clips.model_used: string — which model generated this, e.g. 'kling_3.0'
clips.prompt_used: string | null — the exact prompt, for reproducibility

scores.motion_quality: integer 1-5 — smoothness, naturalness, no jitter or warping
scores.character_fidelity: integer 1-5 — how well the character matches reference images
scores.prompt_adherence: integer 1-5 — did the clip do what was specified in the shot board
scores.technical_quality: integer 1-5 — resolution, sharpness, absence of artifacts
scores.transition_readiness: integer 1-5 — does the clip start/end in usable states for adjacent shots
scores.emotional_fit: integer 1-5 — does the energy and mood match this moment in the song
scores.composite_score: number — average of all scores, calculated not manually entered

clips.disposition: string — from: approved | regenerate | upstream_fix | cut

approved_details.trim_start_seconds: number | null — if the clip needs trimming from the start
approved_details.trim_end_seconds: number | null — if the clip needs trimming from the end

regeneration_details.failure_reason: string — from: character_drift | motion_artifact | wrong_composition | wrong_action | lighting_mismatch | environment_mismatch | lip_sync_fail | morph_distortion | low_energy | prompt_ignored | technical_defect | other
regeneration_details.suggested_changes: string — specific guidance for next attempt, e.g. 'simplify camera movement to static, character drifts during pan'
regeneration_details.suggested_model: string | null — if try_different_model is true
regeneration_details.priority: string — from: critical (hero shot, must regenerate) | high (important shot, should regenerate) | medium (would improve video) | low (could cut or replace with alternative)

upstream_fix_details.target_workflow: string — which upstream workflow needs correction, e.g. 'reference_assets', 'continuity_package', 'shot_board', 'prompt_translation'
upstream_fix_details.issue_description: string — what's wrong upstream, e.g. 'character reference hair color reads as black in side lighting, causes drift in all stage_dark shots'
affected_shots: string — all shot IDs affected by this upstream issue, e.g. ['S003', 'S007', 'S014', 'S022']

pattern_diagnosis.description: string — e.g. 'All medium close-up shots in stage_dark environment show character hair color shifting from brown to black'
pattern_diagnosis.likely_cause: string — e.g. 'Character reference image has ambiguous hair color under dark lighting. Reference was generated under neutral lighting but all stage shots use warm directional light.'
pattern_diagnosis.recommended_fix: string — e.g. 'Generate additional character reference under warm side-lighting matching stage_dark lighting rules. Update continuity package to include lighting-specific character variant.'
pattern_diagnosis.severity: string — from: blocking (cannot finish video without fixing) | degrading (video quality noticeably lower) | minor (cosmetic, could ship as-is)
